name: Review Web Application Firewall Logs
description: Analyse WAF logs for XSS payloads, script injection, cookie theft attempts, and suspicious request patterns

sections.title: Procedure
sections.body:
1. Query WAF logs for the time window surrounding the suspected session hijack
2. Filter for XSS-related rule triggers (script injection, event handlers, encoded payloads)
3. Search for requests containing suspicious cookie or token exfiltration patterns:
   - document.cookie in request parameters
   - Encoded script tags in query strings or POST bodies
   - Requests to known token-stealing endpoints
4. Identify the attacker's source IP and check for other malicious requests from the same IP
5. Review blocked vs allowed requests — determine if the attack bypassed WAF rules
6. Check for session fixation patterns (Set-Cookie manipulation in requests)
7. Export relevant log entries for evidence preservation

sections.title: Tools
sections.body:
- Cloudflare: Security > Events, filter by rule group 'XSS'
- AWS WAF: Athena query on waf_logs, filter by action and ruleGroup
- Splunk: index=waf sourcetype=waf:logs | search xss OR script OR document.cookie
- ELK: Kibana > Discover, filter WAF index by rule_id or message content
- ModSecurity: grep -i 'xss\|script\|cookie' /var/log/modsec_audit.log
